name: Married couple - Two children
description: Married couple earning €80,000 with 2 children, 3 fiscal parts total

sources.description: Verified using official French tax formula (PLF 2026). Taxable income: €66,655.20. Family quotient: 3.0 parts (2 + 0.5 + 0.5). Quotient: €22,218.40. Tax on quotient: €1,168.02. Professional expenses: €8,000.
